DEFAULT_TF_PROMPT: {{TERMINAL}} Write a summary of the following file.

TEMPLATES.COMMENT_FOR_USER: Some Chinese LLMs might work better in certain circumstances with instructions given in Chinese. For that purpose, you may replace MAIN_TL_INSTRUCTIONS with ZH_TL_INSTRUCTIONS in the prompt presets below. There is also a differently worded version of the English instructions that allows indicating the source language, it is the prompt I use for the script that does one shot translations of this program's strings. Some models, like Qwen, can also benefit from using a grammar file (the GitHub repository has examples) to suppress Hanzi.
